app.title: Albion Packet Explorer
toolbar.update.tip: Download and install update, then restart
toolbar.device.tip: Select network adapter to capture Albion traffic from.
toolbar.capture.tip: Start live packet capture. Npcap must be installed. Run as Administrator if capture fails.
toolbar.stop.tip: Stop live capture. All captured packets remain visible.
toolbar.layout.tip: Switch between side-by-side and stacked layout. (F5)
toolbar.saveJson.tip: Save all loaded or captured packets to a newline-delimited JSON file.
toolbar.openJson.tip: Load a saved packet capture (newline-delimited JSON).
toolbar.toggleSidebar.tip: Show or hide the filter sidebar. (F5)
panel.eventSummary.help:
Each row = one packet type (e.g. EVENT 32).
Count = how many times seen.
Keys = which param indices were present, with % showing how often.
100% = always present (required field). Less = optional or conditional.

Click a row to filter the packet list below.
panel.packetList.help:
All individual packets matching the current filter.
Filter is set automatically when you click a row in Event Summary.
Click a packet row to inspect its fields in the detail panel.
panel.packetDetail.help:
Key/Type/Value breakdown of the selected packet.
Key = param index (0-255). Type = wire type. Value = decoded value.
Right-click a row to edit a param name or note.
panel.packetDetail.helpShort: Right-click a row to edit a param name or note.
status.ready: Select a network device and click Start, or open a file.
status.devicesFailed: Could not list devices (is Npcap installed?): {0}
toast.captureStarted.title: Capture Started
toast.captureStopped.title: Capture Stopped
toast.fileLoaded.title: File Loaded
toast.loadFailed.title: Load Failed
toast.copied.title: Copied
toast.copied.keySummary.title: Copied to Clipboard
list.filter.edit.tip:
Click to edit filter query
Syntax: term  kind:X  code:32  name:X  params:X  prefix - to exclude
list.col.name: Name
detail.resolved.empty: No params resolved to item names for this packet.
detail.hide.save.tip: Save current hidden rows as preset
summary.unknownFirst.tip: Sort codes with no known name to top
summary.col.name: Name
fullValue.title: Full Value
editParam.badge.base.tip: Name comes from the built-in packet dictionary.
settings.title: Settings
settings.capture.title: Capture
settings.shortcuts.sidebar.desc: Show or hide the filter sidebar.
settings.shortcuts.autoSelect.desc: When on, the newest captured packet is selected automatically.
settings.shortcuts.rowExpand.desc: Expand or collapse the selected Packet Detail row (arrays and dicts).
settings.shortcuts.hint: Click a shortcut box and press a key or combination to set it. Press Esc to cancel.
settings.display.resolveNames.desc: Show UniqueName and English display name for numeric param values.
settings.display.resolveNames.note: Item data is downloaded from public Albion data sources on first launch and cached for 7 days.
settings.display.density.desc: Row height and font size for the summary, list and detail grids.
settings.display.sidebarKey.desc: Click and press a key (or combo) to set the shortcut that shows or hides the filter sidebar. Press Esc to cancel.
settings.display.tray: Close button hides to system tray
settings.display.tray.desc: Clicking X hides the window instead of closing. Use the tray icon to show or exit.
settings.display.resolveIcons.desc: Show item icons in the Packet Detail panel.
settings.display.resolveIcons.note: Icons are downloaded from public Albion data sources and cached permanently to disk.
settings.display.forceExpand.desc: Automatically expand all Packet Detail rows to show full decoded values.
settings.display.forceExpand.note: Arrays and dicts are shown one entry per line with item index resolution.
settings.display.autoStart.desc: Start network capture automatically when the app opens.
settings.display.autoStart.note: Uses the last selected device (or all adapters if set to Automatic).
settings.display.autoSave.desc: Save all captured packets to a JSON file when closing the app.
settings.display.autoSave.note: Saved to the app data logs folder with a timestamped filename.
settings.paths.appData.desc: Settings, layout, presets and the item/icon cache are stored here. Change it to move everything to a new location.
settings.paths.changeNote: Choosing a new folder moves the existing files there so nothing is left behind.
settings.paths.logFolder.desc: If you use a tool that records Albion network traffic, its packet log usually lives in one of these instance subfolders. Optional - you can also just open any saved JSON file.
settings.paths.itemCache.desc: Downloaded from public Albion data sources, refreshed every 7 days. Defaults to the App Data folder.
settings.paths.itemCache.customNote: Custom location set. The cache is normally kept inside the App Data folder; a separate folder means item data is downloaded and stored there instead.
toast.path.moved.title: Location Changed
toast.path.set.title: Location Changed
toast.path.failed.title: Could Not Change Location
settings.schema.desc: Export the merged param schema for an event or request as standalone JSON you can reuse.
settings.schema.preview.placeholder: Enter a kind and code above to preview the schema…
settings.theme.dark.desc: Switch between dark and light base theme.
settings.theme.color.desc: Pick a color accent for the UI.
settings.about.name: Albion Packet Explorer
settings.about.desc: Inspect and decode Albion Online network packets from a live capture or a saved log. Explore every field of every packet to understand the game's network protocol.
